That bug has been fixed at 2007/03/09 
Please update your ports an try again. 

Your Makefile should be revision 1.76 

$ dot -Tx 
Renderer type: "x" not recognized. Use one of: canon cmap cmapx dia dot fig gd gd2 gif hpgl imap ismap jpeg jpg mif mp pcl pic plain plain-ext png ps ps2 svg svgz vrml vtx wbmp xdot
